title: Animals & Actions
theme: pets, farm animals, action verbs, can/can't

tprBreak.promptText: Hop like a rabbit! Swim like a fish! Now fly like a bird!

items.distractorRationale: All four pet distractors; harder discrimination.

activities.title: Listen and Tap: Mixed Review (Pets + Colors)

items.distractorRationale: Mixed review: color + pet, three options.
Mixed review: color + pet, three options.

tprBreak.promptText: Make the cow sound! Now waddle like a duck! Now flap like a chicken!

activities.title: Listen and Tap: Sound to Animal

items.distractorRationale: Match animal sound to its animal.
Match animal sound to its animal.
Match animal sound to its animal.
Match animal sound to its animal.
Match animal sound to its animal.
Match animal sound to its animal.

panels.narrationText: Coco the Goat walks on the farm. She wants to hear a quiet sound.
The cow says moo. The sheep says baa. Not so quiet.
The pig says oink. The horse says neigh. Still not so quiet.
The duck says quack. The chicken says cluck. Loud and proud!
Coco peeks in the pond. A fish blows bubbles. Bubble, bubble. So quiet!
Every voice is welcome on the farm. Loud, soft, big, small — all friends.
Coco the Goat walks on the farm. She wants to hear a quiet sound.
The cow says moo. The sheep says baa. Not so quiet.
The pig says oink. The horse says neigh. Still not so quiet.
The duck says quack. The chicken says cluck. Loud and proud!
Coco peeks in the pond. A fish blows bubbles. Bubble, bubble. So quiet!
Every voice is welcome on the farm. Loud, soft, big, small — all friends.

questions.promptTranscript: Which animal made the quietest sound?
What sound does the horse make?
Put Coco's farm walk in order.
items: Coco meets the cow and the sheep.
Coco meets the pig and the horse.
Coco meets the duck and the chicken.
Coco finds the fish in the pond.

tprBreak.promptText: Run in place! Now jump! Walk slowly. Pretend to swim. Now fly with your arms. Now sleep — shhh!

items.distractorRationale: All four movement verbs as distractors.
All four movement verbs as distractors.

activities.title: Listen and Tap: Mixed Review (Pets + Actions)

tprBreak.promptText: Show me what you CAN do! Wiggle your fingers! Now point to something you CAN'T do yet — that's okay, you'll learn.

items.distractorRationale: Negative ability: highlight what an animal does not do.
Negative ability: highlight what an animal does not do.
Negative ability: highlight what an animal does not do.

items.promptTranscript: Tap: a bird can't swim like a fish.
Put the words in order: a bird can fly.
Put the words in order: a fish can swim.
Put the words in order: a fish can't walk.
Put the words in order: a cat can't fly.

panels.narrationText: In the forest, the friends share what they can do.
I can fly, says the bird. Up, up, up!
I can swim, says the fish. Swish, swish, swish!
Everyone can do something different. That's what makes us friends.
In the forest, the friends share what they can do.
I can fly, says the bird. Up, up, up!
I can swim, says the fish. Swish, swish, swish!
I can climb, says the bear. Up the big tree!
A fish can't walk. A cat can't fly. That's okay — we all do different things.
Everyone can do something. What can you do today?

questions.promptTranscript: Put the friends in the order they spoke.
items: Everyone shares what they can do.
